arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's replacement sacked after just six weeks in charge as risk backfires
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon promoted their B team boss into his first senior job when Ruben Amorim left for Manchester United, but the move has proven to be a complete failure

arts.ttl: ‘Big surprise’ as PSG ‘seriously consider’ signing Wolves player in January
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has impressed for Wolverhampton Wanderers this season despite their struggles in the Premier League. The forward has managed nine goals and three assists from 17 league games and his displays haven’t gone unnoticed. arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim January update as striker offered in exchange deal
arts.sum: Manchester United will have the opportunity to sign one of Europe's finest strikers in January but may have to part way with an attacker in order to secure a deal.

arts.ttl: Manchester United could be without five players vs Wolves amid Marcus Rashford decision
arts.sum: The latest team news as Man United and Ruben Amorim prepare to resume their Premier League charge against Wolves at Molineux (5.30pm).

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Man United
arts.sum: Wolves vs Man United kicks off at 5.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 5pm. Live text coverage of Wolves vs Man United is also being provided on Boxing Day as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Amad's struggles at Man Utd under Erik ten Hag uncovered by ex-Red Devils coach
arts.sum: Benni McCarthy has opened up on Amad's lack of game time at Manchester United under Erik ten Hag, suggesting that the Dutchman preferred to play flop Antony because he 'knew his capabilities'

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Manchester United TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's side continue their Premier League charge against relegation-threatened Wolves at Molineux on Boxing Day (5.30pm).

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Barcelona hold Alexander-Arnold talks; Man Utd's Osimhen blow

arts.ttl: Mouse droppings lead to Man Utd hygiene downgrade
arts.sum: The club said a "robust pest-control system" was in place and improvements were under way.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United make the trip to Molineux to face Wolves in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Ruben Amorim will be demanding a response from his side after back-to-back defeats, including a 3-0 humbling at home to Bournemouth last weekend.
